all.en: This service level agreement is between the provider and the customer.
all.zh: 本服務水準協議由服務提供者與客戶共同訂立。

all.en: It defines the performance standards expected from the cloud service.
all.zh: 本協議定義雲端服務應達成的效能標準。

all.en: The agreement takes effect on the date of subscription activation.
all.zh: 本協議自訂閱啟用日起生效。

all.en: Monthly uptime is committed at ninety nine point nine percent or higher.
all.zh: 月度可用率承諾為百分之九十九點九或更高。

all.en: Uptime is calculated based on total minutes within each calendar month.
all.zh: 可用率以每曆月總分鐘數為基礎計算。

all.en: Scheduled maintenance windows are excluded from uptime calculations.
all.zh: 排定的維護時段不納入可用率計算。

all.en: Maintenance notifications will be sent at least seventy two hours in advance.
all.zh: 維護通知將於至少七十二小時前發出。

all.en: Critical incidents are defined as full service unavailability.
all.zh: 重大事件定義為服務完全無法使用。

all.en: Response time for critical incidents is within fifteen minutes.
all.zh: 重大事件的回應時間為十五分鐘以內。

all.en: Resolution targets vary by severity level and complexity of the issue.
all.zh: 解決目標依事件嚴重等級與複雜度而有所不同。

all.en: Severity one issues are targeted for resolution within four hours.
all.zh: 嚴重等級一的事件目標於四小時內解決。

all.en: Severity two issues are targeted for resolution within one business day.
all.zh: 嚴重等級二的事件目標於一個工作日內解決。

all.en: Service credits apply if monthly uptime falls below the committed level.
all.zh: 若月度可用率低於承諾標準將適用服務點數補償。

all.en: Credits range from ten percent to fifty percent of monthly fees.
all.zh: 補償點數金額為月費的百分之十至百分之五十。

all.en: Customers must submit credit requests within thirty days of the incident.
all.zh: 客戶須於事件發生後三十天內提出補償申請。

all.en: Service credits are the exclusive remedy for missed performance targets.
all.zh: 服務點數為未達效能目標的唯一補償方式。

all.en: Force majeure events are excluded from service level calculations.
all.zh: 不可抗力事件不納入服務水準計算。

all.en: Examples include natural disasters and major internet outages.
all.zh: 範例包含自然災害與重大網路中斷。

all.en: The provider will maintain detailed incident reports for each event.
all.zh: 服務提供者將為每次事件維護詳細事件報告。

all.en: Post incident reviews are shared with customers upon request.
all.zh: 事件後檢討依需求與客戶分享。

all.en: Performance reports are published monthly on the customer portal.
all.zh: 效能報告每月於客戶入口網站發佈。

all.en: Either party may request a service level review on a quarterly basis.
all.zh: 任一方均可每季要求進行服務水準檢討。

all.en: Changes to the service level agreement require written mutual consent.
all.zh: 服務水準協議的變更需經雙方書面同意。

all.en: This excerpt summarizes only the key provisions of the full document.
all.zh: 本摘錄僅總結完整文件的關鍵條款。
